hints: If B is 0, delete the head node by returning A.next.
Otherwise, traverse to position B-1 (0-based indexing).
Update the next pointer of the node at position B-1 to skip the B-th node.
Set the deleted node's next to null (optional but good practice).
Return the original head A (unless deleting the head).
